answers.alpha: 0 rad/s² (net torque about center pin is zero by symmetry)
answers.note: The rod will translate downward (pin reaction carries the weight) but not rotate

key_concepts: gravity acts at center of mass
solution_steps: Gravity acts at G (center of mass = pin location)
Torque of gravity about G = m·g × 0 = 0 (zero moment arm)
The pin carries the full weight: Gy = m·g = 19.62 N (upward)
